description: Operational dashboard for Veidemann contentwriter uploads, failures, and fallback backlog.

panels.description: Scrape health for each contentwriter pod.
panels.title: Targets up by pod

panels.description: Current fallback backlog file count for each selected contentwriter pod.
panels.title: Fallback backlog files by pod

panels.description: Restart count for the contentwriter container on each selected pod.
panels.title: Container restarts by pod

panels.description: Total number of completed uploads across the selected time range.
panels.title: Uploaded files

panels.description: Total uploaded bytes across the selected time range.
panels.title: Uploaded bytes

panels.description: Average uploaded bytes per completed upload across the selected time range.
panels.title: Avg bytes per upload

panels.description: Rolling p95 upload duration using the dashboard rate interval.
panels.title: Upload p95 duration

panels.description: Total failed upload attempts across the selected time range.
panels.title: Upload failures

panels.description: Uploads where the uploaded byte count did not match the on-disk file size.
panels.title: Size mismatches

panels.description: Total bytes reported by the writer before upload across the selected time range.
panels.title: Written bytes

panels.description: Total on-disk file size observed at upload time across the selected time range.
panels.title: On-disk bytes

panels.description: Failed post-upload file stat operations across the selected time range.
panels.title: Stat failures

panels.description: Files moved into fallback storage after upload failure across the selected time range.
panels.title: Fallback moved

panels.description: Upload attempts for files already present in fallback storage across the selected time range.
panels.title: Fallback retry attempts

panels.description: Failures while moving files into fallback storage across the selected time range.
panels.title: Fallback move failures

panels.description: Uploaded bytes per second across the selected pods.
panels.title: Upload throughput

panels.description: Completed uploads per second across the selected pods.
panels.title: Upload throughput (files)

panels.description: Rolling upload latency percentiles.
panels.title: Upload latency percentiles

panels.description: Error rates across upload, verification, and fallback handling paths.
panels.title: Upload and fallback failure rate

panels.description: Current total number of files waiting in fallback storage.
panels.title: Current backlog files

panels.description: Current total byte size of files waiting in fallback storage.
panels.title: Current backlog bytes

panels.description: Current fallback backlog bytes for each selected contentwriter pod.
panels.title: Fallback backlog bytes by pod

panels.description: Current fallback backlog file count over time.
panels.title: Fallback backlog files over time

panels.description: Current fallback backlog byte size over time.
panels.title: Fallback backlog bytes over time

panels.description: Fallback handling activity rates across moves, retries, and move failures.
panels.title: Fallback activity rate

panels.description: Uploaded byte volume per dashboard bucket interval.
panels.title: Uploaded bytes per interval

panels.description: Completed upload count per dashboard bucket interval.
panels.title: Uploaded files per interval

title: Veidemann Contentwriter
